title: How to get all the updates(conversation) of a particular Item
excerpt:
As I am working in Item view APP, I need to get all the updates(conversation) of that particular Item. 
Could you please help us on this? 
Thanks in Advance!

posts.author: Priya (Priyadharshini)
posts.cookedHtml:
As I am working in Item view APP, I need to get all the updates(conversation) of that particular Item.

Could you please help us on this?

Thanks in Advance!

posts.author: alessandra (Alessandra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Priya,

To get item information from an Item View App, you can use our SDK.

Our SDK allows you to make API calls on behalf of the connected user with the monday.api method. You can make a query to the Updates of the item for the textual values.

I hope this helps! Please let me know if you have any more questions.

posts.author: Priya (Priyadharshini)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi alessandra,

How to get input field ID using onChange event in Vibe component?

Could you please example code for form with many fields.

Since I am using Antd comopentwe can easily get each input field’s Id along with values.

Now I am changing UI to monday.com Vibe component. It would be helpful if I get some sample code.

How to schedule meeting with monday.com team member for clarification as there is no calendly link in the document anywhere?

Thanks in advance!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Priya,

I replied in the other topic you opened

How to get input field ID using onChange event in Vibe? monday Apps & Developers
Hello there @Priya, I am not sure I understand what you need. What are you referring to when you say “input field ID”? The ID of what input field? From a trigger? From an action? What input field exactly? What is your exact use case?
